arts.ttl: Owen Hargreaves and Robbie Savage defend 'super talented' Rasmus Hojlund amid Man United striker's struggles
arts.sum: Owen Hargreaves and Robbie Savage have jumped to the defence of Rasmus Hojlund amid the Man United striker's struggles. Hojlund has received a considerable amount of criticism of late.

arts.ttl: Who is Mathys Tel? Man Utd, Arsenal and Chelsea target set for major deadline-beating transfer
arts.sum: Tottenham have agreed a £50million deal with Bayern Munich to sign French striker Mathys Tel but the transfer is far from guaranteed, as Manchester United, Arsenal and Chelsea consider a late hijack

arts.ttl: Owen Hargreaves and Robbie Savage give Ruben Amorim 'harsh' low scores when asked to rate manager's start to life in charge of Man United
arts.sum: Amorim has not enjoyed a dream start to life as Manchester United manager. He won just seven of his first 17 games in the job, losing seven and drawing three.

arts.ttl: LIVE: FCSB host Man United in Europa League final group stage
Why Amad and Alejandro Garnacho don't start for Manchester United vs FCSB
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has had to rotate his team for Thursday night's Europa League clash with FCSB in Romania.

arts.ttl: Manchester United sent Marcus Rashford transfer message as time runs out in frustrating talks
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Manchester Evening News readers, Thomas Fair)
arts.sum: The January transfer window is coming to an end, and a move for Rashford will be difficult

arts.ttl: Steaua Bucharest v Manchester United: Europa League – live

Every time there is a home touch on the ball, the crowd go wild. The atmosphere is electric! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim identifies dream Man Utd swap deal but suffers unlikely transfer blow
arts.sum: Manchester United could be among the chief protagonists in the final days of the transfer window with Ruben Amorim possibly seeing new signings and late exits at Old Trafford
